hero.ledgerLede: Search every active job ad from Platsbanken, build your CV and keep track of every application, from draft to response. All in one place.
hero.source: Built on open data from the Swedish Public Employment Service
hero.guest: Explore as a guest, without an account

features.title: Everything you need to stay organised

search.body: All active job ads from Platsbanken, updated around the clock. Search by occupation and location, sort by recency or application deadline.

matching.body: Every job ad is matched against your profile with a clear percentage, so you can spend your time on the right applications.

applications.body: Track every application from draft to response: interviews, offers and rejections. Nothing falls through the cracks.

cvReview.body: Get concrete feedback on what your CV should contain: what is missing, what is unclear and what can be highlighted.

companyWatch.body: Follow employers you want to work for and get notified as soon as they publish a new job ad.

reminders.body: Interviews and application deadlines are captured automatically from your applications, so you do not miss a deadline.

auth.free: Jobbliggaren is completely free to use.
auth.fine: By creating an account you accept the terms of use and the privacy policy. Jobbliggaren never sells your data.

footer.blurb: Keep your whole job search in order. Search, apply and follow up in one place.
footer.source: Built on open data from the Swedish Public Employment Service

cookies.title: Cookies
cookies.intro: Jobbliggaren uses only necessary cookies for the service to work.
cookies.sessionBody: keep you signed in when you have an account.
cookies.languageBody: remembers whether you chose Swedish or English.
cookies.noTracking: No cookies are used for analytics, tracking or marketing.
cookies.fullPolicyNote: A full cookie policy is being prepared.

terms.title: Terms of use
terms.intro: Full terms of use are being prepared.
terms.duringBeta: Until further notice the following applies:
terms.asIs: The service is provided as is. Features may change or be added.
terms.dataRetention: We store your details only for as long as is needed to handle your registration or your account.
terms.dataDeletion: You can ask us to delete your details at any time by replying to the confirmation email or contacting us.

meta.cookiesDescription: Information about cookies on Jobbliggaren. Only necessary cookies are used.
meta.termsDescription: Jobbliggaren's terms of use. Full text is being prepared.
meta.homeTitle: Find, apply for and follow up on jobs
meta.homeDescription: Search every active job ad from Platsbanken, build your CV and follow up on every application, from draft to response.
